packageRules.description: graphql-js-17 tracks the npm `alpha` dist-tag (17.x pre-release line)
graphql-js-16 stays on the 16.x stable line
corpus-gen tracks the graphql-java that Viaduct shared-arbitrary was compiled against (v26 moved VariablesTypesMatcher and breaks binary compat). Remove when Viaduct picks up graphql-java >=26.
